calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Philip T. Kilduff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Jennifer Boisselle.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 14, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Declaration of Ruben Alcaraz in Lieu of Personal Testimony---------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against defendant JENNIFER BOISSELLE as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,782.80.
Prejudgment Interest - $391.53.
Attorney's Fees - $450.00.
Costs - $221.00, for a total of $2,845.33.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than Tuesday, May 20, 2008.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2008 Set For Trial On May-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Continued To Feb-29-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
